name: Dragons
author: GamakCZ
readme_markdown:
![Picture](https://i.ibb.co/7C2wWMC/Dragons.png)


✔ Simple setup
✔ Multi arena support
✔ Lag-clean
✔ Map reset
✔ Tested on 100+ players server

How to setup?

-

Installation:

1. Download latest release or sucess build 2. Upload it to your server folder /plugins/ 3. Restart the server -

Create and setup an arena:

1. Create an arena using `/dg create` 2. Then follow setup instructions

Dragons commands

- All the commands requires operator permissions - The command is registered under /dragons with alias /dg | Command | Description | | --- | --- | | **/dg help** | **Displays list of help**

![](https://i.ibb.co/p2jnYmM/obrazek.png) | | **/dg create** | **Creates a new arena** | | **/dg list** | **Displays list of arenas**

![](https://i.ibb.co/QPPsz37/obrazek.png) | | **/dg remove** | **Removes an arena**

- Requires an id from /dg list | | **/dg start** | **Force start game** |

Credits

- This plugin was created because of [PatarHD's](https://www.youtube.com/user/Patarhd123) 24hours coding competition. Although I had 36 hours of time for making the plugin (because of increase), I had finished it within 16 hours and 40 minutes. So if I wanted, I would have 20 hours more for coding :smile:. - And as usual... Icons made by Freepik from www.flaticon.com
